examples.title: Pseudocode: Blockchain Tiers
examples.description: Demonstrating the basic concept of blockchain tiers
examples.code:
FUNCTION determineBlockchainTier(accessType)
 IF accessType == 'public' THEN
 RETURN 'Public Blockchain'
 ELSE IF accessType == 'private' THEN
 RETURN 'Private Blockchain'
 ELSE IF accessType == 'consortium' THEN
 RETURN 'Consortium Blockchain'
 END IF
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic function to determine the blockchain tier based on the access type.

examples.title: Python: Blockchain Tiers
examples.description: Implementing a simple blockchain tier system in Python
examples.explanation: This Python code defines a simple class to represent blockchain tiers and determine the tier based on the access type.
